0.text: Diffuse emphysematous changes in both lungs

1.text: Atelectasis adjacent to the effusion in both lower lobes

2.text: Large consolidation-mass with a cavity in the central part of the right upper lobe, measuring 8.5 cm at its widest point

3.text: Thick-walled lesion in the right upper lobe

4.text: Budding tree appearances in the right lung middle lobe and lower lobe adjacent to the described area

5.text: Budding tree appearances in a small area of the left lower lobe
